## Purpose

Describe the bounded-investment or evidence problem this change addresses.

## Boundaries checked

- [ ] Preference scores are not presented as success probabilities.
- [ ] Hard gates remain non-compensatory.
- [ ] Scenario cash flows remain assumptions, not forecasts.
- [ ] Brand-extension, alliance, and reputation risks remain explicit.
- [ ] No proprietary course or private third-party material was copied.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Ruff passes.
- [ ] Documentation and fictional examples are updated.
